name: components/file-field
description: A file-upload input with drag-and-drop zone support, file-list rendering, and remove actions. Provides a complete composition system with FileField, FileFieldDropzone, FileFieldItem, FileFieldItemDeleteTrigger, FileFieldItemMetadata, FileFieldItemName, FileFieldItemPreview, FileFieldItemSize, FileFieldLabel, FileFieldHiddenInput, and FileFieldTrigger. Supports multiple files, MIME-type and size validation, progress states, and accessible file removal. Built on Kobalte FileField with full ARIA file-input semantics.
useCases: Profile-avatar uploaders with image preview, size validation, and drag-and-drop zone
Document-attachment fields in support tickets or CRM records accepting PDFs and images
Bulk CSV or JSON importers that list selected files with individual remove buttons
Gallery-upload flows showing thumbnails, file names, and upload-progress indicators
usage: import { FileField, FileFieldDropzone, FileFieldItem, FileFieldItemDeleteTrigger, FileFieldItemName, FileFieldItemPreview, FileFieldItemSize, FileFieldLabel, FileFieldHiddenInput } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/file-field"
